name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<forks>>

        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = 0
       /\ flag = 0
       /\ maxFlag = 0
       /\ maxNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = IF flag' THEN num ELSE num' + 1
       /\ flag' = IF flag THEN flag ELSE flag' + 1
       /\ maxNum' = IF maxFlag' THEN maxNum ELSE maxNum' + 1
       /\ maxFlag' = IF maxFlag THEN maxFlag ELSE maxFlag' + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ size' = size + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ size' = size - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
         /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
         /\ head \in 0..K-1
         /\ tail \in 0..K-1
         /\ size \in 0..K

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ==

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys: /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \/ {NULL}]
          /\ \A k \in Keys: store[k] \in Values \/ {NULL}

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channelState, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE /-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE /-> 0]

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = 0
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = 1
        /\ \E loss \in {0, 1} :
            /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = loss]
            /\ IF loss = 0 THEN
                /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
                /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
                /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]

                /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
                /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
                /\ channelState' = channelState

TypeOK ==
    /\ fileChunks \in [1..FILE_SIZE -> 1..FILE_SIZE]
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ channelState \in [1..FILE_SIZE -> 0..1]

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channelState>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq free
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0, 1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1 - turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = 1]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1 - turn] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
          /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
